faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the World Cup Jersey Color Quiz?
faq.a1: The World Cup Jersey Color Quiz is a free online game that tests how well you know the home kit colors of all 48 teams competing in the 2026 FIFA World Cup in USA, Mexico, and Canada. Pick the correct jersey color from four options and see how many teams you can get right!
faq.q2: How do I play the World Cup kit quiz?
faq.a2: A team name is shown along with their World Cup group. You pick the color you think matches their home jersey. Correct answers earn 10 points, and streak bonuses reward consecutive correct guesses. You have 3 lives — guess wrong 3 times and it's game over!
faq.a3: Yes! The World Cup Jersey Color Quiz is completely free to play with no sign-up required. Just start guessing!
faq.q4: How many teams are in the 2026 World Cup?
faq.a4: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is the first to feature 48 teams, expanded from the previous 32-team format. The tournament is hosted across the United States, Mexico, and Canada.
faq.q5: Can I compete with other fans?
faq.a5: Yes! Check the Legends leaderboard to see how your score compares to football fans worldwide. Both all-time and daily leaderboards are available.
faq.q6: Which teams are in the 2026 World Cup?
faq.a6: The 48 teams include football giants like Brazil, Argentina, France, Germany, Spain, England, and Portugal, as well as exciting debutants like Curaçao. Teams are divided into 12 groups of 4.

announcement.text: FIFA World Cup 2026 is LIVE! How many jersey colors can you guess?
